doc.projectIntro: This quote covers one Microsoft Exchange Online (Plan 2) licence for Sun Destinations — a 100GB mailbox with in-place archiving, data loss prevention and anti-malware / anti-spam protection. Provided as a Microsoft NCE subscription on a 12-month term, billed monthly. All prices exclude VAT (15%).

items.detail: Per-user licence (Microsoft NCE), 12-month term billed monthly. Includes a 100GB mailbox, in-place archiving, data loss prevention and anti-malware / anti-spam. Assigned user: Shondre.

doc.summaryNote: Billed monthly on a 12-month Microsoft NCE term. Licence is per user (assigned to Shondre). Additional licences can be added at the same per-user rate.
terms: This quote is valid for 14 days from the date of issue.
All prices exclude VAT at 15% unless otherwise stated.
This is a Microsoft NCE subscription with a 12-month commitment, billed monthly in advance, and renews annually unless cancelled before the renewal date.
The licence is assigned per user.
Microsoft pricing is subject to OEM (Microsoft) price changes and exchange-rate movement.
Payment of the monthly licence fee is due in advance.

banking.branch: Blue Route Mall, Tokai Road, Tokai, 7945
banking.reference: Please use quote number as payment reference.

internal.note: Multi NCE — Exchange Online Plan 2, R125.87 ex VAT/mo cost. Standard 15% markup. SKU CFQ7TTC0LH1P:0001:Commercial. For Sun Destinations user Shondre (requested by Tim Clarke, 2026-06-17).
